titleStmt.title: SII 40.305: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 305. (A.R. No. B. 350 of 1933.) Bestavēmula, Jammalamadugu Taluk, Cuddapah District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a broken stone lying in a field north of the village.
This is dated Śaka 1437, Yuva, Māgha, śu. 5, corresponding to 1516 A.D., January 9, Wednesday.

Records the gift of land as dasavandha to the Upparas (for excavated a tank) of the village Bestavēmula by Sāḷuva Paṇḍita, on behalf of Lakkumarusu-Nāyaka, who obtained the village as Umbaḷi from Sāḷuva Gōvindarāja, to whom the king had granted the Gaṇḍikōṭadurga.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ṁ su(śu)bhamastu . svasti śrī vijayādbhu
ya śālivāhanaśakhavaruśaṁ(ṣaṁ)bulu
1437 yagunēṭṭi . I(yu)va saṁvatsara māgha
śu 5 lu śrīman mahārājādhirājarāja
paramēśvara śrī vīrapratāpamūrurāyara
gaṁḍa gajabēṭēkāra śrī kriṣṇarāyadēvamā
harāyalu pṛtivirājyaṁsēsi kālamaṁddu
sāḷuvagōviṁddarājugāri pāliccina vijayanagara
siṁhasthānanāku celle gaṁḍikōṭa duṁrgaṁ yī durgā
nākuja(ce)lle bestavemulagrāmaṁ gōviṁdarājulaku ma
rusunēnigāri vubbaḷikki pāliṁcci māku yiccina be
stavēmulagrāmaṁ śrīmatulakkumarusu nā
yinigāri Ānatini sāḷuvapaṁḍitugāru
vupparajeṭṭi tiṁmasāni malarāju
nāriniṭi dugga mōdalaiyina
nālugupāḷa vupparavārikiṁnni yiccina ceruvu
dasavaṁdaṁ śāsanakramameṭlaṁnanu mīru vūrki pa
ḍumaṭanu krottagānu ceruvu kaṭṭina nimityaṁ mī
ku dasavaṁdaṁ voṁdirālaterustaḷaṁ cēnu
kha 1 nu I ceruvukriṁda varimaḍi kuṁ . nu Akṣarā
lānu cēnu vuṁḍeḍunnu varimaḍi paṁdumu
mīku sarvvamānyaṁgānu peṁṭitimi māku peṭevu
pu sidā Āyaṁ rokhaṁ varahālu vagaginnu
manniṁci vuppapolaṁ Āṁtavaṁṭṭunnu mīku
sarvvamānyaṁgānu yistimi yi ceruvu padilaṁ se
suka Ācaṁdrarkhāsthāyigānu mībiṁḍḍa bi
ḍamannu maṁtramunnu sēsuka Anubhaviṁci
bratikēdi .

yiduku yavvaru tappinānu vā
raṇaśilō gōbrahmaṇivadhi
yiccina pāpana bōvuvāru
svadaṁttā dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ pa
radaṁttapālanaṁ paradaṁttāpahā
rēṇa svadaṁtā viṣphalaṁ bhavēt
Abhumarsunāyani
voppa
Digital edition of SII 40.305 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
